user.title: BJP Keep
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to the BJP Keep add-on over your local network. This URL is used by Home Assistant itself, not by browsers or remote dashboards.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to BJP Keep. Check the local API URL and that the add-on is running.
error.invalid_url: Enter a full local URL such as http://home-assistant.local:3000.
error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected by BJP Keep.
